barRaise.topFinding: BLOCK: hard rule no_public_link_to_hordes_or_brackish_rising is breached by three anchors on public pages; three lenses flagged it independently. The resolution is a reroute, not a rule amendment, because the stamped per-project design pages already exist and are currently orphaned. Beyond the BLOCK, the theme of this run is that YaE publishes more than it means to: several classes of internal operational material are committed to this public repo and are fetchable from the live site, held back only by robots.txt, which restrains crawlers and nobody else. One of them discloses the location of a credential belonging to another project. Details, paths, and the remediation order are deliberately kept out of this public JSON and recorded in the local bar-raise report. Separately, the cross-project work queue doubled in size to roughly 4.35x the FUSE truncation threshold, and zero of eleven prior findings were closed by action across three runs.

actions.title: Reroute Design buttons to projects/{here-be-hordes,brackish-rising}/design.html; drop /hordes/ link from 404 (clears BLOCK)
Untrack the committed internal ops files, widen the backup ignore rule, redeploy, then verify each is no longer fetchable
actions.evidence: see local report; verified with a live GET

actions.title: Add base64 payload-integrity guard (decode + assert closing html tag) for BOTH hordes and brackish-rising gates
Shrink the cross-project work queue (roughly 4.35x the FUSE threshold) and route appends through atomic write-with-readback
Drain or formally close the 11 rotting bar-raise findings; fix writer so firstSeen is recorded not null
Scope the bar-raise skip-unchanged gate to YaE-owned paths so foreign status-JSON commits stop forcing full fan-outs
Budget sub-pages link to a 404 repo while claiming source is published and auditable; make public or reword and delink
Fix hero stat strip: 6/6 projects, 4 live, 6 in build vs 9 real cards
Refresh tagline and About prose; add Cattery, Gnosis, Ring to the enumeration
Add Cattery and Gnosis to meta/og/twitter descriptions and JSON-LD hasPart
Exclude the committed skill-source tree from the Pages artifact
Fix WCAG AA contrast: --fg-3 at 2.65:1 (sub-page footers), --fg-2 at 4.17:1 (crumbs, labels)
Add prefers-reduced-motion guard and :focus-visible to the 18 project sub-pages
Add og:image/og:url/twitter:card to project sub-pages; canonical and og for scheduler and budget
Make update-project-pages.mjs exit non-zero on missing/malformed status JSON instead of stamping stale
Add card-to-sitemap parity guard to release.ps1 (sitemap.xml is hand-maintained, no generator)
Add mojibake reject regex to check-status-json.ps1 (mojibake is valid UTF-8 and valid JSON)
Reconcile the two contradictory canonical rules for mutating the cross-project work queue
Version the status/data/*.json cross-repo contract (add schemaVersion and required-key validation)
Rewrite BAR_RAISE_HANDOVER/ROADMAP: they point at scripts/schedule/ shims that no longer exist; roadmap says Active, all phases DONE
actions.evidence: scripts/schedule/ absent from disk and git
